sql_array: CREATE TABLE log_entries (entry_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, log_message VARCHAR(255), log_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO log_entries (log_message, log_time) VALUES (concat(datestring(now()), ' Application started.'), now());
UPDATE log_entries SET log_message = concat(log_message, ' Updated log entry.') WHERE entry_id = 1;
SELECT log_message FROM log_entries WHERE log_time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
EXECUTE string_to_file('logs/applog.txt', concat(datestring(now()), '\t', 'Log entry for today.\n'), -1);
